name: GAMEMAX VISTA AB Black USB3.0/Type C Tempered Glass Mid-tower ATX Computer Case w/6  x 120mm ARGB PWM Fans (2 x MB side, 3 x PSU Top Cover, 1 x Rear) Pre-Installed, Support 4090 GPU and 360mm AIO
shortName: GAMEMAX VISTA AB Black USB3.0/Type C Tempered Glass Mid-tower ATX
description: Mid-tower ATX gaming case with tempered glass and 6 pre-installed ARGB fans, compatible with high-end GPUs and liquid cooling.
